title: CSD Sampling Experiment: Multi-Step Arithmetic × 3 LLMs × CSD Indicator Extraction
summary: Demo notebook analyzing Critical Slowing Down (CSD) indicators across 3 LLMs (LLaMA-3.1-8B, Gemini-2.0-Flash, GPT-4o-mini) on multi-step arithmetic at 24 difficulty levels. Loads 72 pre-computed examples, computes capability boundaries (d*), fits variance scaling laws, tests leading indicators (flickering, silhouette, bimodality), and Kendall Tau trends. Produces summary tables and multi-panel visualizations of CSD indicator trajectories.
